body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends! Happy Monday!

Weekends are gonna be a bit weird about posting. A lot of times, I’m either out late with shows or dashing all day and it throws things kinda wonky.

For a little bit I’m taking sapphic songs and painting scenes from them with my words. (The first two I’ve done are here and here.) I’ll probably include some original yearning and smut mixed in, but I’m having fun with these right now, so may continue for a bit.

I think my plan is to take Thurs/Fri off this week to DoorDash. So I may be a little quiet those days. Or maybe I’ll queue some writing up in advance and have updates those mornings to wake up, we’ll see what my ADHD lets me do this week.

I hope you all have a wonderful Monday! And stay sexy for me, cuties. 😘
